cooldown_minutes.description: Minimum minutes between repeated notifications after the alert fires. 0 means no cooldown.

datapoints_to_alarm.description: How many periods within the evaluation window must breach the threshold to fire (N in N-of-M).

enabled.description: Whether the alert is actively being evaluated. Disabling resets the state to not_firing.

evaluation_periods.description: Total number of check periods in the sliding evaluation window for firing (M in N-of-M).

filters.description: Filter criteria — subset of LogsViewerFilters. Must contain at least one of: severityLevels (list of severity strings), serviceNames (list of service name strings), or filterGroup (property filter group object). May be empty on draft alerts (enabled=false).

key.description: The key should be the flag ID

operator.description: Only flag_evaluates_to operator is allowed for flag dependencies

value.description: The value can be true, false, or a variant name

name.description: Human-readable name for this alert. Defaults to 'Untitled alert' on create when omitted.

snooze_until.description: ISO 8601 timestamp until which the alert is snoozed. Set to null to unsnooze.

threshold_count.description: Number of matching log entries that constitutes a threshold breach within the evaluation window. Defaults to 100.

threshold_operator.description:
Whether the alert fires when the count is above or below the threshold.

* `above` - Above
* `below` - Below

window_minutes.description: Time window in minutes over which log entries are counted. Allowed values: 5, 10, 15, 30, 60.
